race.comment: SHOW'EM WHO'S KING (7) was well in the betting when facing the starter for the first time at the Sunny Coast and wasn't too far away on that occasion. Will have taken benefit from that day at the races and where there's smoke there's fire. Can get off the mark this time. The well-related JADDAF (2) (half to G1 winner Chain Of Lightning) hit the frame when having his first run for the new stable and will strip fitter for that outing. Forward showing expected. ELLES MY NAME (15) has been right there at the past couple and will be rock-hard fit for this. Top-three credentials. KAMIGAMO (12) gets in light with the claim and may earn some minor money. IRISH HANDCUFFS (4) next best with race experience now under the belt.
